LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE, INC.'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT ("FAC") DOES NOT COMPLY WITH CRC 2.112 WHICH REQUIRES THAT EACH CAUSE OF ACTION MUST SPECIFICALLY STATE ITS NUMBER, ITS NATURE, THE PARTY ASSERTING IT, AND THE PARTY AGAINST WHOM IT IS DIRECTED. PLAINTIFF IS GIVEN LEAVE TO AMEND TO ATTACH CAUSES OF ACTION TO THE FORM COMPLAINT, AS REQUIRED BY PARAGRAPH 10. ADDITIONALLY, THE FAC DOES NOT ALLEGE ANY FACTS ESTABLISHING A BASIS FOR IMPOSING LIABILITY AGAINST DEFENDANT YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE, INC. PLAINTIFF IS GIVEN LEAVE TO AMEND TO ALLEGE FACTS ESTABLISHING A BASIS FOR LIABILITY AS TO DEFENDANT YELLOW CAB. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: SEAN KANE; REPORTER: MELANIE GHENO, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-06-2016 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-25-2015 Set For Trial On Jun-06-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-21-2015 Continued To Dec-09-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-28-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT YELLOW CAB COOPERATIVE, INC.'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained with 10 days leave to amend. The First Amended Complaint ("FAC") does not comply with CRC 2.112 which requires that each cause of action must specifically state its number, its nature, the party asserting it, and the party against whom it is directed. Plaintiff is given leave to amend to attach causes of action to the form complaint, as required by Paragraph 10. Additionally, the FAC does not allege any facts establishing a basis for imposing liability against Defendant Yellow Cab Cooperative, Inc. Plaintiff is given leave to amend to allege facts establishing a basis for liability as to Defendant Yellow Cab. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)
